heading: Limitations on sale of alkaline-manganese batteries containing mercury
label: 14332 Limitations on sale of alkaline-manganese batteries containing mercury
text: No person shall sell, offer for sale, or offer for promotional purposes any alkaline-manganese battery manufactured on or after , with a mercury content that was intentionally introduced (as distinguished from mercury that may be incidentally present in other materials), except that the limitation on mercury content in alkaline-manganese button cells shall be 25 milligrams of mercury per button cell.May 13, 1996
